name: blog_or_content_page_10_blogs_news

observed_strengths.observation: Strong SEO-intent blog articles: 'How to Make Adaptogenic Coffee at Home', 'What Is Instant Coffee: Everything You Need To Know', 'Why I love brewing coffee in a Chemex' — educational content targeting coffee enthusiast search queries
'STAY BOLD, STAY CAFFEINATED. SIGN UP AND SAVE 20% OFF YOUR FIRST ORDER' email capture H2 on blog index page — email acquisition built into blog experience

missing_or_weak.observation: Blog index page crawled (not individual post) — individual post-level email capture and in-content product CTAs are not confirmed from page structure

Blog meta description is generic: 'Welcome to the Death Wish Coffee Company blog. You'll find pictures, recipes, reviews, lists' — doesn't target coffee-specific SEO queries that would match article content

purchase_path_notes: Blog content is strong with educational intent-matching articles. Email capture on blog index is confirmed. In-post product CTAs are the key unverified conversion mechanism.
